ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: cane sugar, vegetable oils' (sunflower oil', coconut oil'), 16% hazelnuts, skimmed milk powder', 8% lean cocoa powder', vegetable fat (cocoa butter), emulsifier: lecithin sunflower', natural aroma of vanilla, ingredients from certified organic agriculture, trace any soya and other nuts,
